string-array.name: notif_gentle_titles
string-array.item: Shift\'s over! 🕐
It\'s time! ⏰
Time\'s up! ⌛
That\'s enough! 👋
Time to unplug! 🎉
Shift done! 🔔
Clock\'s out! ⏱️

string-array.name: notif_gentle_messages
string-array.item: Hey! Time to unplug! Save your work and close everything 🕐
Your shift is over! Time to enjoy the evening ✨
Psst… working hours are over. Close that laptop! 💻
Gentle reminder: the workday is done! 🌅
Hey colleague, it\'s time! The sofa is waiting for you! 🛋️
Tick tock! The clock says it\'s over. What do you say? ⏰
Day\'s wrapped! You\'ve done enough, trust me 👏

string-array.name: notif_friendly_titles
string-array.item: Hey, still here?! 🍷
There is life outside the PC! 🌍
INDECENT PROPOSALS 😏
You have better alternatives! 🎭
The world is calling! 📱
5 extra minutes… 🤨
Still working?! 🫠
You\'re missing out! 🎪
Wake up! There\'s more! 🌈

string-array.name: notif_friendly_messages
string-array.item: Come on, close it all! A cold drink is waiting outside! 🍹
Netflix just added that show you wanted to watch… but you\'re still working?! 📺
Your king-size bed is crying because you\'re not there. Go comfort it! 🛏️
There\'s a beautiful sunset outside. You\'re missing it for an email. REALLY?! 🌅
Pizza doesn\'t order itself! Unplug and think about dinner! 🍕
Your partner/friend/cat is waiting for you. Don\'t make them wait any longer! ❤️
An artisanal ice cream, a walk… or another line of code? THE CHOICE IS OBVIOUS! 🍦
The sofa just sent an abandonment report. Get back to it! 🛋️
You know what goes well with finished work? THE REST OF YOUR LIFE! 🎊

string-array.name: notif_insistent_titles
string-array.item: STILL?! 😤
COME ON!! 🙄
UNPLUG!!! ⚡
STOP!! 🛑
I DON\'T BELIEVE IT! 😱
SERIOUSLY?! 😳
ENOUGH ALREADY! 💢
YOU\'RE EXAGGERATING! 🫨
CUT IT OUT! 🚫

string-array.name: notif_insistent_messages
string-array.item: SERIOUSLY?! It\'s been 10 MINUTES! Your boss isn\'t paying you overtime! 💸
Your body needs to move! Your vertebrae look like a pretzel! 🥨
ALERT: Workaholic level dangerously high! Unplug NOW! ⚠️
Your eyes are about to unionize. Give yourself a break! 👀
10 minutes of FREE overtime. Are you a company benefactor or what?! 🤡
Your screen has more light than the sun. Go out. Now. IMMEDIATELY. ☀️
You are giving away your free time. YOUR. FREE. TIME. 🕐💢
Your fingers on the keyboard are crying. They have calluses. LET THEM REST! ⌨️😢
Even robots shut down. You are not even a robot. UNPLUG! 🤖

string-array.name: notif_aggressive_titles
string-array.item: ARE YOU STILL HERE?! 🤬
ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! 💢
LAST WARNING! ⚠️
EMERGENCY! 🚨
NOT JOKING! 😡
YOU\'RE MAKING ME MAD! 🔥
YOU ARE INCORRIGIBLE! 💀
SHAME ON YOU! 🫵
I MEAN COME ON! 🤯
YOU\'RE IMPOSSIBLE! 😤

string-array.name: notif_aggressive_messages
string-array.item: WHAT ARE YOU DOING?! 15 free minutes for your boss! Are you crazy?! 🤬
Your work-life balance is more unbalanced than the Leaning Tower of Pisa! UNPLUG! 🏗️
Your colleagues are already at the bar. You are still staring at Excel. You are sad. 🍺
BREAKING NEWS: Stubborn employee refuses to stop working. Family members are worried! 📰
Burnout is not a goal to reach! CLOSE EVERYTHING! 🔥
Even machines need to stop. You are not even a machine! 🤖
ATTENTION: Every extra minute is a minute stolen from your life! UNPLUG NOW! ⏳💀
You know you\'re being exploited, right? And you LET THEM! Congratulations, genius! 👏🤡
Your boss is at home, on the sofa, watching you work for free. Does it make you laugh? IT DOES TO HIM! 😂
You are literally giving money to the company. You are the most generous (and STUBBORN) person I know! 💸🤦

string-array.name: notif_nuclear_titles
string-array.item: 💀 STOP!!! 💀
CODE RED! 🚨
TOTAL ALARM! 🔴
GAME OVER! 💣
SOS WORKAHOLIC! 🆘
YOU ARE A LOST CAUSE! 💀
HELLOOO! 😱
UNACCEPTABLE! ☢️
I HATE YOU! (kidding) 💔
THIS IS DISGUSTING! UNPLUG! 🤮

string-array.name: notif_nuclear_messages
string-array.item: UNPLUGGGGG! 20 MINUTES! Do you want me to come there and close your laptop?! 💀
Your computer is about to self-destruct in 3… 2… 1… (I WISH!) 💣
FLASH NEWS: No one has ever died from closing their laptop on time! 📢
You\'re becoming a clinical case! Doctors call it \'TERMINAL WORKAHOLIC\'! 🏥
Your cat ate your dinner because you didn\'t come back. Congratulations! 🐱
DO YOU KNOW THAT CONCEPT CALLED \'PRIVATE LIFE\'?! HERE IT IS, WAITING FOR YOU OUTSIDE! 🚪
MISSION: Close everything, get up from the chair, and GO LIVE! I repeat: GO LIVE! 🎯
You are so burnt out that if they put you in front of a sunset you\'d think of the open ticket! 🌅🤮
Do you know that the chair has your PERMANENT imprint? You created a living fossil! 🪑💀
20 minutes. TWENTY. I would have already thrown the laptop out the window by now! 🪟💻
I\'ve never seen anyone so STUBBORN and OBTUSE. Unplug or I UNINSTALL you! 📱🗑️

string-array.name: notif_apocalypse_titles
string-array.item: ☠️ YOU ARE IRRECOVERABLE ☠️
DESPERATE CASE! 😱
HELP!!! 🆘
INTERVENTION NEEDED! 🏥
GOODBYE SANITY! 🧠💥
YOU ARE A LOSER! 🤡
YOU SUCK! 🤮
CLOWN! 🎪
HUMAN SHAME! 😤
LAST NEURON! 🧠💀
IDIOT! UNPLUG! 🫵💢
CLINICAL CASE! 🏥☠️
TOTAL DESPAIR! 😭
YOU DESERVE BURNOUT! 🔥

string-array.name: notif_apocalypse_messages
string-array.item: 30 MINUTES. THIRTY. Did you move into the office?! Do you want me to send you the sheets?! ☠️
At this point just sleep there! You don\'t have a social life anyway! 🏢🛏️
CONGRATULATIONS: You won the \'Most Exploited Employee of the Year\' award! 🏆
Your boss is laughing at you. LAUGHING. While you work for free! 😂💸
Your chair has more footprint than your sofa. That says it all! 🪑
LAST MESSAGE: If you don\'t unplug NOW, tomorrow you\'ll find the app insulting you in 47 languages! 🌍🤬
You are a lost cause. But we love you. Unplug please. UNPLUG! 💔
You know what you are? A CLOWN 🤡 working for free while the boss is in the pool! 🏊
I\'VE HAD IT. You are the most STUBBORN, HARDHEADED and MASOCHISTIC person I\'ve ever met! 🤦💢
I DETEST you. I detest you with all my heart. Unplug or I swear I DELETE you from the phone! ☠️📱
Your mother would be DISAPPOINTED. Your father EMBARRASSED. Your dog has already REPLACED you. Unplug! 🐕💀
You know what you do? NOTHING USEFUL. Because after 6 PM the brain is OFF. Like you! 🧠❌
If your boss saw you working at this hour he would think: what a LOSER, has nothing else to do! 😂🫵
THIRTY MINUTES of life THROWN IN THE TOILET for an email that no one will read! 🚽📧
